message:
docs(readme): replace fictional compute_weight(i) with inline expression (br-vc9cp / fd90.162)

fd90.162: self-review of fd90.115. The Random Sampling example at
line 1641 had:

  let weights: Vec<f64> = (0..df.len()).map(|i| compute_weight(i)).collect();

compute_weight is undefined anywhere. It was a placeholder for
'user-defined weight function' but a copy-paste hits:
  error[E0425]: cannot find function `compute_weight` in this scope

This is an outlier among the README's code examples — every other
example after the fd90.74-161 audit cleanup compiles cleanly when
imported via prelude::*.

Fix: replace with an inline weight expression
  (i + 1) as f64
so the example is genuinely runnable with positional weighting (later
rows favored). Pure README change. No code impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
